title: bus.dead_letter v1
description: An event that could not be routed or parsed. Published to bus.dead_letter instead of being silently dropped. Enables visibility into LLM-generated payload drift and replay after correction.

original_type.description: The type field from the failed event, or 'UNKNOWN' if unparseable

original_payload_excerpt.description: First 500 chars of the raw payload for debugging

schema_violation_detail.description: Specific validation error message if failure_reason=schema_violation
